title: Batch cooking and freezing meals for postpartum
excerpt: Make-ahead Vietnamese-friendly dishes, freezer safety, reheating, and notes for breastfeeding parents.
content:
## Meal ideas

- Bone broth soups (canh), lean braised pork (thịt kho), steamed fish portions.
- Cooked rice frozen in portions; vegetable stir-fries.

## Freezing

Cool food quickly; use airtight containers; label date. Most cooked dishes keep 2–3 months for best quality.

## Reheating

Reheat until steaming hot throughout; do not reheat rice repeatedly if safety is uncertain.

## Notes for nursing parents

Garlic and chili are usually fine unless baby shows clear sensitivity — discuss elimination only with guidance.
